name: Monokrom Galeri
signature: Four horizontal shutter strips slide upward like a camera opening on cover open; silver shimmer sweeps the couple names; scanline duotone overlays dress the couple photos in editorial black-and-white; giant editorial index numbers (01–14) anchor every section; a draw-in mono rule replaces plain dividers; falling silver grain particles drift continuously; and a maximized 6-layer parallax + 6-speed float field of film strips, apertures, and focus crosshairs fills all 14 sections (84 total decorative elements).
brief: Photography-forward couples who want almost no color — huge black-and-white portraits, layout reads like a print magazine not a typical invite. Premium upgrade with maximum floating density (6 layers per section), shutter-reveal animation, silver grain rain, and duotone scanline photo frames. Includes full standard section set.
